title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry Capital India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry Capital India:
Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India!
